name: python3-jwcrypto
title: python3-jwcrypto
summary: Python3 implementation of JOSE Web standards
description:
Python3 implementation of JOSE Web standards
This python module implements JWK,JWS,JWE specifications using
python-cryptography.
.
This package includes the python3 version.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-jwcrypto because Python3 implementation of JOSE Web standards.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-jwcrypto as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-jwcrypto with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-jwcrypto --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
